message:
refactor: replace manual JSON-RPC in worker with MCP SDK

Use McpServer + WebStandardStreamableHTTPServerTransport (stateless mode)
instead of hand-rolled JSON-RPC protocol handling. Same tool behavior,
full MCP spec compliance, ~40 fewer lines.

- Worker now uses same McpServer pattern as src/index.ts
- Tool registration via server.tool() with Zod schemas
- CORS handled via withCors() wrapper on transport responses
- Removed manual initialize/tools-list/tools-call dispatch (~100 lines)
